codeReview.summary: The feature adds stable row/column selectors and a deterministic virtualization guardrail without changing list behavior. The test exercises scroll, filter toggles, and a cross-column move at 2000 items, and the production changes are limited to inert data attributes.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The perf-guardrails worker skill still tells workers to run package tests as `bun --cwd <path> run test`, but Bun 1.3.10 in this repo requires `bun run --cwd <path> test`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: The worker handoff records a deviation because `bun --cwd packages/web run test` printed usage instead of running, and `.factory/skills/perf-guardrails-worker/SKILL.md` still documents the old syntax in the validator step and example handoff.

summary: Pass. The virtualization DOM-cap guardrail is correctly scoped, deterministic, and aligned with VAL-PERF-001; only a shared skill-command syntax mismatch was observed outside the feature code.
